checks.finding: No dangling acceptance-criterion references: AC-001 through AC-013 cited by task Done When criteria all exist in acceptance-tests.md.
T-001 through T-005 each have a Blockers section containing either literal None or comma-separated valid task IDs; precheck-result.json also records blockers_format_valid=true.
REQ-001 through REQ-005 are covered respectively by T-001 through T-005 in each task's Requirements field.
AC-001 through AC-013 are each tied to a concrete TEST-NNN and task in the task Done When criteria and traceability.md Acceptance Mapping.
Every task T-001 through T-005 references one existing requirement, respectively REQ-001 through REQ-005.
No task is an exclusively test-file task or has a test/spec/verify title; the implementation tasks' directly tied verification work references AC-001 through AC-013 in their Done When criteria.

precheck-result.json declares provenance_rereview=true; all tasks have Approved sudo audit marks and lifecycle-valid statuses: T-001 through T-004 are Implementation Complete and T-005 is In Progress.
T-001 through T-004 declare Risk: high with Required Workflow: tdd, and T-005 declares Risk: critical with Required Workflow: tdd; precheck-result.json records workflow_match_precheck=PASS.
Each AC-001 through AC-013 has one primary task assignment in traceability.md Acceptance Mapping, with no duplicate same-scope primary target.
Every dependency referenced by T-002 and T-005 exists in dependency-graph.json nodes T-001 through T-005.
The dependency graph is acyclic: T-002 waits for T-001, and T-005 waits for T-001 through T-004, with no path returning to an originating node.
Each task maps one issue and one coherent concern: tokenizer classification, HMAC comparison, evidence-path validation, risk-track selection, or generated guard invariants.

Every task's Done When criteria name concrete TEST-NNN results, implementation or quality-gate evidence, and exact non-frozen verification addendum paths; none requires editing a review-frozen artifact.

traceability.md contains task mappings for T-001 through T-005 and requirement rows for existing REQ-001 through REQ-005; every requirement row cites valid anchors in the hash-bound security-spec.md or infra-spec.md.
